examples.title: Basic dropdown
examples.description: A button trigger with a list of menu items.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Dropdown } from 'cinder/dropdown';
  import { DropdownItem } from 'cinder/dropdown-item';
  import { DropdownMenu } from 'cinder/dropdown-menu';
  import { DropdownTrigger } from 'cinder/dropdown-trigger';
</script>

<Dropdown id="dropdown-basic">
  <DropdownTrigger>Options</DropdownTrigger>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownItem>Edit</DropdownItem>
    <DropdownItem>Duplicate</DropdownItem>
    <DropdownItem variant="danger">Delete</DropdownItem>
  </DropdownMenu>
</Dropdown>

examples.title: Placement
examples.code:
{#snippet trigger()} {/snippet}
Aligned to left edge
 {#snippet trigger()} {/snippet}

examples.title: With clickable items
examples.description: DropdownItem accepts onclick handlers and a danger variant for destructive actions.
examples.code:
Document actions (selected = 'Copy link')}>Copy link (selected = 'Duplicate')}>Duplicate (selected = 'Delete')}>Delete

Selected: {selected}

examples.title: With group labels
examples.description: DropdownGroup and DropdownLabel expose accessible group boundaries for related menu actions.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Dropdown } from 'cinder/dropdown';
  import { DropdownGroup } from 'cinder/dropdown-group';
  import { DropdownItem } from 'cinder/dropdown-item';
  import { DropdownLabel } from 'cinder/dropdown-label';
  import { DropdownMenu } from 'cinder/dropdown-menu';
  import { DropdownTrigger } from 'cinder/dropdown-trigger';
</script>

<Dropdown id="dropdown-with-label">
  <DropdownTrigger>Grouped menu</DropdownTrigger>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownGroup labelledBy="dropdown-with-label-document">
      <DropdownLabel id="dropdown-with-label-document">Document</DropdownLabel>
      <DropdownItem>Rename</DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem>Move</DropdownItem>
    </DropdownGroup>
    <DropdownGroup labelledBy="dropdown-with-label-sharing">
      <DropdownLabel id="dropdown-with-label-sharing">Sharing</DropdownLabel>
      <DropdownItem>Copy link</DropdownItem>
      <DropdownItem>Invite people</DropdownItem>
    </DropdownGroup>
  </DropdownMenu>
</Dropdown>

examples.title: With separators
examples.description: DropdownSeparator divides menu item groups; useful before destructive actions.
examples.code:
<script lang="ts">
  import { Dropdown } from 'cinder/dropdown';
  import { DropdownItem } from 'cinder/dropdown-item';
  import { DropdownMenu } from 'cinder/dropdown-menu';
  import { DropdownSeparator } from 'cinder/dropdown-separator';
  import { DropdownTrigger } from 'cinder/dropdown-trigger';
</script>

<Dropdown id="dropdown-with-separator">
  <DropdownTrigger>More actions</DropdownTrigger>
  <DropdownMenu>
    <DropdownItem>Copy link</DropdownItem>
    <DropdownItem>Duplicate</DropdownItem>
    <DropdownSeparator />
    <DropdownItem variant="danger">Delete</DropdownItem>
  </DropdownMenu>
</Dropdown>
